request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families. As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vulnerable we are when we rely too much on others. Our allies won't always be there when we need them most. Let's build our own defenses so we can stand strong, together. #NationalSecurity #StrongerTogether
